title: syringa meyeri f. alba
intro: Syringa meyeri f. alba, also known as the 'White Midnight' or 'White Korean Lilac', is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Oleaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Syringa meyeri f. alba include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Syringa meyeri f. alba include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
